title: erodium × variabile
intro: Erodium × variabile, also known as the variable herb or storksbill, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the geranium family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Erodium × variabile include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Erodium × variabile can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
